mapper.sql: select r.id, i.id as dicom_instance_id, r.study_instance_uid, r.series_instance_uid, r.sop_instance_uid, r.orthanc_instance_id, r.pixel_data_sha256, r.metadata_sha256, r.file_sha256, r.signed_content, r.signature_algorithm, r.signature_value, r.public_key_id, r.import_user_id, r.import_time, r.last_verify_time, r.verify_status, r.remark, r.create_time, r.update_time from ndt_dicom_integrity_record r left join ndt_dicom_instance i on i.sop_instance_uid = r.sop_instance_uid and i.del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into ndt_dicom_integrity_record (study_instance_uid, series_instance_uid, sop_instance_uid, orthanc_instance_id, pixel_data_sha256, metadata_sha256, file_sha256, signed_content, signature_algorithm, signature_value, public_key_id, import_user_id, import_time, last_verify_time, verify_status, remark, create_time, update_time) values (#{studyInstanceUid}, #{seriesInstanceUid}, #{sopInstanceUid}, #{orthancInstanceId}, #{pixelDataSha256}, #{metadataSha256}, #{fileSha256}, #{signedContent}, #{signatureAlgorithm}, #{signatureValue}, #{publicKeyId}, #{importUserId}, #{importTime}, #{lastVerifyTime}, #{verifyStatus}, #{remark}, sysdate(), sysdate())
mapper.update: update ndt_dicom_integrity_record set study_instance_uid = #{studyInstanceUid}, series_instance_uid = #{seriesInstanceUid}, sop_instance_uid = #{sopInstanceUid}, orthanc_instance_id = #{orthancInstanceId}, pixel_data_sha256 = #{pixelDataSha256}, metadata_sha256 = #{metadataSha256}, file_sha256 = #{fileSha256}, signed_content = #{signedContent}, signature_algorithm = #{signatureAlgorithm}, signature_value = #{signatureValue}, public_key_id = #{publicKeyId}, import_user_id = #{importUserId}, import_time = #{importTime}, last_verify_time = #{lastVerifyTime}, verify_status = #{verifyStatus}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = sysdate() where id = #{id}
